sevenDay.synopsis: Weather is a GO today, as VFR conditions are widespread across the LFA. NEG hazards are expected, The same goes for tomorrow. By Saturday, we could see a brief period of IFR in the AM and showers/ISOLD TS in the PM. Sunday starts off IFR, and rain chances drop a little. Heading into next week, IFR could be an issue each AM with improvements by 09L. The chance for showers/ISOLD TS also continues thru much of next week. I doubt it will be enough coverage to impact flight training.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 23 APR - 29 APR
